title: Async Context, Logs, Metrics, Traces, Health, and Incident Evidence · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A production review compares near-miss TypeScript decisions for async context, logs, metrics, traces, health, and incident evidence and demands the smallest safe bounded telemetry and health evidence contract with changed-input evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded telemetry and health evidence contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Emit structured events with timestamp, severity, stable event name, bounded route, request and trace correlation, outcome, latency, and field-level redaction.
Define request, error, duration, saturation, queue, pool, event-loop, process, and business metrics with bounded labels and histogram semantics.
Create OpenTelemetry server spans with stable route names, span kind, method, status, error, network, server, propagation, sampling, and sensitive-data policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Structured Log Redaction · changed case · Quiz Structured Log Redaction
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz team handles case 8921 in a privacy-sensitive records API using conditional requests. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to emit bounded route telemetry and distinguish server errors from readiness capacity; show recovery after the overload input is removed; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Emit structured events with timestamp, severity, stable event name, bounded route, request and trace correlation, outcome, latency, and field-level redaction.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Structured Log Redaction · changed case · Quiz Structured Log Redaction.
